privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated ERPNext data populated via setup_task.sh. It explicitly creates the supplier 'Eagle Hardware', the item 'Shaft', and a Purchase Order for 30 units. The verifier.py and export_result.sh explicitly demand the template name 'Shaft Incoming QC' and expect the results at '/tmp/quality_inspection_purchase_result.json'. All metadata claims perfectly match the ground truth logic of the environment and task scripts.
